tasks.title: Network Configuration
tasks.instructions:
Configure the network interface on node1 with the following static settings:

- IP address: 172.25.250.11/24
- Default gateway: 172.25.250.254
- DNS server: 172.25.250.254
- Hostname: node1.lab.example.com

All settings must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: YUM Repositories
tasks.instructions:
Configure two YUM/DNF repositories on node1:

- Repository name: BaseOS
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/BaseOS

- Repository name: AppStream
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/AppStream

GPG signature checking must be disabled for both repositories. Configuration must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: SELinux Web Port 82
tasks.instructions:
Configure the Apache HTTP server (httpd) to serve content on port 82:

- httpd must listen on port 82
- Port 82 must be allowed through SELinux and the firewall
- The service must start automatically at boot and be accessible on port 82

tasks.title: Users and Groups
tasks.instructions:
Perform the following user and group management tasks:

- Create a supplementary group named sysadm
- Create user harry with sysadm as a supplementary group
- Create user natasha with sysadm as a supplementary group
- Create user sarah with /sbin/nologin as her login shell
- Set the password radiowits for users harry, natasha, and sarah

tasks.title: Collaborative Directory
tasks.instructions:
Create a collaborative directory /shared/sysadm with the following properties:

- Group ownership: sysadm
- Permissions: group sysadm has full read/write/execute access; others have no permissions
- The setgid bit must be set so new files inherit the sysadm group

tasks.title: autofs NFS Automount
tasks.instructions:
Configure autofs to automatically mount the NFS home directory for user netuserX:

- NFS server: classroom.example.com (172.25.254.254)
- Exported path: /netdir/netuserX
- Local automount point: /rhome/netuserX

The directory must mount on-demand when accessed and persist across reboots.

tasks.title: Cron Job
tasks.instructions:
Configure a cron job for user natasha:

- Schedule: every 3 minutes
- Command: logger "EX200 running"

The cron job must run under natasha's personal crontab.

tasks.title: NTP Client
tasks.instructions:
Configure the system to synchronize time with the following NTP server:

- NTP server: classroom.example.com

Time synchronization must be active and persist across reboots.

tasks.title: Find Files by Owner
tasks.instructions:
Find all files owned by user sarah anywhere on the system and save the full list of file paths to /root/find.user.

The file must contain one path per line and must survive a reboot.

tasks.title: Find Strings in File
tasks.instructions:
Search /usr/share/dict/words for all lines containing the string ich and save the matching lines to /root/lines.

The output file must contain only the matching lines in their original order.

tasks.title: User with UID
tasks.instructions:
Create a new user account with the following properties:

- Username: John
- UID: 1545
- Password: radiowits

tasks.title: Tar Archive
tasks.instructions:
Create a gzip-compressed tar archive of the /etc directory:

- Archive location: /root/archive.gz
- Source: /etc
- Compression: gzip

tasks.title: Build Container Image
tasks.instructions:
As user Andrew, build a container image named watch from the provided Containerfile.

The Containerfile is located at: /home/linus/watch/Containerfile

The image must be visible in Andrew's local podman image store.

tasks.title: Container Systemd Service
tasks.instructions:
As user Andrew, configure a Podman container named watcher as a persistent systemd user service:

- Image: watch (built in Task 13)
- Container name: watcher
- Mount /opt/files to /opt/files inside the container
- Mount /opt/processes to /opt/processes inside the container
- The systemd user service must be named containerwatcher.service
- The service must start automatically at boot without requiring an active login session

tasks.title: Root Password Reset
tasks.instructions:
Reset the root password on node2 (boot-menu VM) to radiowits using the VNC console.

The new password must allow root login and persist across reboots.

tasks.title: YUM Repositories NODE2
tasks.instructions:
Configure two YUM/DNF repositories on node2 (lvm VM):

- Repository name: BaseOS
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/BaseOS

- Repository name: AppStream
  URL: http://content/rhel9.0/x86_64/dvd/AppStream

GPG signature checking must be disabled. Configuration must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: Resize Logical Volume
tasks.instructions:
Resize the logical volume vo to exactly 20 extents.

The filesystem must remain intact and the volume must still be mounted after resizing.

tasks.title: Swap Partition
tasks.instructions:
Add swap space of between 660 MiB and 760 MiB.

The swap must activate automatically at boot.

tasks.title: Create Logical Volume
tasks.instructions:
Perform the following LVM storage tasks:

1. Create a volume group named database using available unallocated disk space
2. In the database VG, create a logical volume named engineering with 20 extents, formatted as ext3, mounted persistently at /mnt/database

3. Create a second volume group named datastore
4. In the datastore VG, create a logical volume of exactly 8 MiB

All mounts must persist across reboots.

tasks.title: tuned Profile
tasks.instructions:
Set the active tuned performance profile to virtual-guest.

The profile must be active and persist across reboots.
